## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant SEO improvements: Site-wide traffic up 80%, blog traffic up 8%, with strong LLM referral growth](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Coffee chat graphics and Gong recording updates in progress; Eric from Webstacks to assist directly](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [HubSpot lead list import issue to be resolved with date formatting adjustment](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Paid search effectiveness questioned; potential shift towards organic and AI-driven traffic strategies](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation and Graphics

  - [Eric from Webstacks to work directly with GrowthX on coffee chat graphics and Gong recording updates](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Designer working on initial blog graphics; team to prioritize top 10 blogs for focus](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Team to check Eric's access to Airtable for necessary resources](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### HubSpot Lead List Import

  - [Create date importing as code instead of actual date](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Jesse to provide formula for reformatting ISO date to standard format](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Date added field not updating; Jesse to investigate and resolve](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### FAQ and TLDR Overview

  - [Jacob sent over FAQ and TLDR overview](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Jesse to review and provide feedback asynchronously or discuss next week](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Site-wide traffic up 80%, blog traffic up 8% in September](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Google SERP changes affecting impression metrics (30% drop industry-wide)](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Strong LLM referral growth: 1,000-1,500 clicks per week, 40-45% growth](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [New content showing positive trends with rising impressions and initial clicks](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### Paid Search Strategy

  - [Jesse questioning effectiveness of current paid search campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Potential shift towards reducing paid search in favor of organic and AI-driven traffic](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Team to consider testing reduced paid search, especially for branded terms](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Some new content batches performing well, others facing challenges (low impressions, potential cannibalization)](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Plan to refresh underperforming content with internal linking and title/header adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Proposal to reduce new publishing slightly to focus on optimizing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to follow up with Jakub on additional support options (e.g., web strategist involvement)](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Team to set up scrunch prompts for new content batch, focusing on AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Implement content optimization plan for underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Jesse to review FAQ and TLDR overview](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Jesse to provide date reformatting formula for HubSpot lead list import](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring SEO performance and LLM referral growth](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [Consider testing reduced paid search campaigns and analyze impact](https://fathom.video/share/BCDSHxg46VZzz8KZ6GeoTQf7cXpn5yGt?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
